parameters.query:
select j.joborder_number , r.retroid as sn, rg.product_model, 
rg.product_phase, rg.product_series, j.createtime,
rg.beginseries,
rg.endseries,
pm.product_model_name
from mes.retroid_generate rg 
join mes.retroid r on rg.retroid_generate_id = r.retroid_generate_id
join mes.joborder j on j.joborder_id =r.joborder_id
join mes.product_info pi2 on pi2.product_id =j.product_id
join mes.product_model pm on pm.product_model_id =pi2.product_model_id 
where r.retroid ='{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.sn }}'
limit 40000

select j.joborder_number , r.retroid as sn, rg.product_model, 
rg.product_phase, rg.product_series, j.createtime,
rg.beginseries,
rg.endseries,
pm.product_model_name
from mes.retroid_generate rg 
join mes.retroid r on rg.retroid_generate_id = r.retroid_generate_id
join mes.joborder j on j.joborder_id =r.joborder_id
join mes.product_info pi2 on pi2.product_id =j.product_id
join mes.product_model pm on pm.product_model_id =pi2.product_model_id  
where j.joborder_number ='{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.joborder_number}}' and r.retroid ='{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.sn }}'
limit 40000

SELECT 
    j.joborder_number, 
    rg.product_model, 
    rg.product_phase, 
    rg.product_series, 
    j.createtime,
    rg.beginseries,
    rg.endseries,
    pm.product_model_name  
FROM 
    mes.retroid_generate rg 
JOIN 
    mes.joborder j ON j.joborder_id = rg.joborder_id
JOIN 
    mes.product_info pi2 ON pi2.product_id = j.product_id
JOIN 
    mes.product_model pm ON pm.product_model_id = pi2.product_model_id   
WHERE 
    j.joborder_number = '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.joborder_number}}' 
    AND rg.status = 0;

select * from mes.retroid r 
where r.retroid ='{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.sn }}'and r.status !='3'

select * from mes.joborder j
where j.joborder_number ='{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.joborder_number }}'

select * from mes.joborder j
where j.joborder_number ='{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.joborder_number }}'

select * from mes.retroid r 
where r.retroid ='{{ $('去除空格和换行符').item.json.body.sn }}'and r.status !='3'

select * from mes.retroid r 
where r.retroid ='{{ $('去除空格和换行符').item.json.body.sn }}'and r.status !='3'

rg.product_phase, rg.product_series, rg.createtime,
rg.beginseries,
rg.endseries,
pm.product_model_name
from mes.retroid_generate rg 
join mes.retroid r on rg.retroid_generate_id = r.retroid_generate_id
join mes.joborder j on j.joborder_id =r.joborder_id
join mes.product_info pi2 on pi2.product_id =j.product_id
join mes.product_model pm on pm.product_model_id =pi2.product_model_id  
where  r.retroid ='{{ $('去除空格和换行符').item.json.body.sn }}'
and rg.product_phase='{{ $('去除空格和换行符').item.json.body.product_phase }}'
and rg.product_series='{{ $('去除空格和换行符').item.json.body.product_series }}'

    mes.product_model pm ON pm.product_model_id = pi2.product_model_id   
WHERE 
    rg.product_phase='{{ $('去除空格和换行符').item.json.body.product_phase }}'
    AND rg.status = 0;

SELECT 
    j.joborder_number, 
    rg.product_model, 
    rg.product_phase, 
    rg.product_series, 
    j.createtime,
    rg.beginseries,
    rg.endseries,
    pm.product_model_name  
FROM 
    mes.retroid_generate rg 
JOIN 
    mes.joborder j ON j.joborder_id = rg.joborder_id
JOIN 
    mes.product_info pi2 ON pi2.product_id = j.product_id
JOIN 
    mes.product_model pm ON pm.product_model_id = pi2.product_model_id   
WHERE 
    rg.product_model='{{ $('去除空格和换行符').item.json.body.product_model }}' 
  and
  rg.product_series='{{ $('去除空格和换行符').item.json.body.product_series }}'
